title: mentha procumbens var. ruralis
intro: Mentha procumbens var. ruralis, also known as country peppermint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It possesses medicinal properties that have been used for centuries to alleviate digestive issues, headaches, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha procumbens var. ruralis include its ability to ease nausea, reduce inflammation, and soothe the digestive tract, making it a popular natural remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote relaxation and provide relief from symptoms associated with colds and flu.
